case_title: SABLE STONE CONSULTING LLC VS. TERI LONDON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABLE STONE CONSULTING LLC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LONDON, TERI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SABLE STONE CONSULTING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON, TERI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON, TERI
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF SABLE STONE CONSULTING LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERI LONDON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABLE STONE CONSULTING LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-13-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SABLE STONE CONSULTING LLC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM AND REPRESENTED BY SIMPSON TURLEY, CEO. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1250 TO THE PLAINTIFF; TO BE PAID IN TWO PAYMENTS OF $625. PAYMENTS ARE DUE BY AUGUST 5TH AND SEPTEMBER 6TH APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEPTEMBER 13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT TERI LONDON IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
